expected_records.title: Conch Flats Community Hall
expected_records.description: Join us to create one-of-a-kind crafts, borrow your favorite sports equipment and more! Fees may apply.

description.text: Join us to create one-of-a-kind crafts, borrow your favorite
sports equipment and more! Fees may apply.

expected_records.title: Poolside Activities
expected_records.description: Soak in the sun with some family-friendly activities, both in and out of the water. See a Recreation Cast Member for more information.

description.text: Soak in the sun with some family-friendly activities, both
in and out of the water. See a Recreation Cast Member
for more information.

expected_records.title: Disney Fit Yoga
expected_records.description: Ground yourself with a gentle yoga session to start your day. Designed for all skill levels, this experience incorporates various poses set to your favorite Disney music!

description.text: Ground yourself with a gentle yoga session to start
your day. Designed for al levels, this experience
incorporates various poses set to your favorite
Disney music!

expected_records.title: Mickey Tie-Dye
expected_records.schedule_text: Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday and Saturday from 2:30pm-3:30pm
expected_records.description: Get creative with a Disney twist on this arts and crafts favorite!

description.text: Get creative with a Disney twist on this arts and
crafts favorite!

expected_records.title: Disney Fit Aqua Fitness
expected_records.description: Move to the music and the water’s natural resistance during this water aerobic exercise class that welcomes all skill levels.

description.text: Move to the music and the water’s natural resistance
during this water aerobic exercise class that welcomes
all skill levels.

expected_records.title: Campfire
expected_records.location: Near the Sandcastle Pool Area Tennis Courts
expected_records.description: Enjoy the warm glow of the campfire with complimentary marshmallows. S’mores kits available for purchase.

location.text: Near the Sandcastle Pool Area Tennis Courts

description.text: Enjoy the warm glow of the campfire with complimentary
marshmallows. S’mores kits available for purchase.

expected_records.title: Pickleball Clinic
expected_records.description: Join us for an introduction to Pickleball! Learn the basic rules and how to volley, serve and dink. Reservations required. Please stop by Community Hall or call 407-827-1183 to reserve your spot.

description.text: Join us for an introduction to Pickleball! Learn
the basic rules and how to volley, serve and dink.
Reservations required. Please stop by Community Hall
or call 407-827-1183 to reserve your spot.

expected_records.title: Sunset Celebration
expected_records.description: Inspired by the nightly, multicultural festival of watching the sun sink into the Gulf at Mallory Square in Key West, Florida. Come celebrate our interpretation of this tradition with family-friendly activities and more.

description.text: Inspired by the nightly, multicultural festival of watching
the sun sink into the Gulf at Mallory Square in Key West,
Florida. Come celebrate our interpretation of this tradition
with family-friendly activities and more.

expected_records.title: Find A Friend
expected_records.location: Throughout Disney’s Old Key West Resort
expected_records.description: Search the Resort for a hidden Orange Bird photo prop. Once located, snap a photo and then head to Community Hall to receive a surprise!

location.text: Throughout Disney’s Old Key West Resort

description.text: Search the Resort for a hidden Orange Bird photo
prop. Once located, snap a photo and then head to
Community Hall to receive a surprise!

expected_records.title: Nighttime Trivia
expected_records.description: Put your knowledge to the test!

description.text: Put your knowledge to the test!

expected_records.title: Conch Crazy Bingo
expected_records.description: Bring the family together for an unforgettable bingo night full of fun, joy, and prizes!

description.text: Bring the family toaether for an unforaettable binao night
ull of fun, joy, and prizes!

expected_records.title: Conch Flats Mosaics
expected_records.description: Design your own mosaic showpiece with a touch of Disney flair. This experience is recommended for Guests ages 12 and up. Class may take up to 2 hours. Reservations are required. Please visit Community Hall or call 407-827-1183 to reserve your spot. Space is limited. Weather permitting.

description.text: Design your own mosaic showpiece with a touch of Disney
and up. Class may take up to 2 hours. Reservations are
required. Please visit Community Hall or call 407-827-1183
to reserve your spot. Space is limited. Weather permitting.
Choose from individual bikes to two-or four-person
surrey bikes for a fun family outing!
